isi.lyrics:
Lyric GUMMY & SINCE - Flip Flop (Prod. Padi)

Romanization

Dare you take and break me down, no no more
You flip easily like a co co coin
aemaehan ne mam Yes or no day by day
jigeutjigeuthae byeondeokseureoun Mood swing dance

You don't even know your mind
geureoldeuthan Plans
algo sipji ana nan
eochapi ppeonhan Play
ipsul kkeute daeun hwiseul Yellow sign's up!
aecheoreom gulji ma I can't take you
Why you so

Flip Flop Flip
Flip Flop Flip
YOU OUT

Why you so flip
Why you don't care
One day you wanna love but
One day don't wanna touch
Why you so flip
Why you don't care
iraetda jeoraetda iraetda jeoraetda

Up and down neoneun rolleokoseuteo
byeondeogui Scale geoui Blockbuster
eoje oneul dareunde iyuga eopseo
han ibeuro dumalhaneun nege du son deureosseo
eoneu jangdane matchwoya halji moreugesseo gojang nan Bounce
eolma namji aneun innaesim 3, 2, 1 Countdown

You don't even know your mind
hetgallige hae
algo sipji ana nan
sigamman kkeureo Stress
ipsul kkeute daeun hwiseul Yellow sign's up!
aecheoreom gulji ma I can't take you
Why you so

Flip Flop Flip
YOU OUT

Why you so flip
Why you don't care
One day you wanna love but
One day don't wanna touch
Why you so flip
Why you don't care
iraetda jeoraetda iraetda jeoraetda

iraetda jeoraetda iraetda jeoraetda

알고 싶지 않아 난

Flip Flop Flip
YOU OUT

Why you so flip
Why you don't care

One day don't wanna touch
Why you so flip
Why you don't care
이랬다 저랬다 이랬다 저랬다

Up and down 너는 롤러코스터
변덕의 Scale 거의 Blockbuster
어제 오늘 다른데 이유가 없어
한 입으로 두말하는 네게 두 손 들었어
어느 장단에 맞춰야 할지 모르겠어 고장 난 Bounce
얼마 남지 않은 인내심 3, 2, 1 Countdown

You don't even know your mind
헷갈리게 해
알고 싶지 않아 난
시간만 끌어 Stress
입술 끝에 닿은 휘슬 Yellow sign's up!
애처럼 굴지 마 I can't take you

isi.albums: 월드 오브 스트릿 우먼 파이터(WSWF) Original Vol.2 (계급미션)
isi.lyrics:
Lyric LILY (NMIXX) & JIWOO (NMIXX) & KYUJIN (NMIXX) - Ridin' (Prod. THE HUB)

Romanization

Make it rain on you like

All eyes on me eodirodeun Yeah
dallineun gil, geu gil wieseo
pyeongbeomhaetdeon I, be a rider
mudae wi gisa Call me like a Jeanne d’Arc Roll up!

Ridin’ with the crew bureul butyeo
Ridin’ with the crew soril nopyeo
Covered up in jewels
That’s a must have
What you, what you trying to do
We have no break
chulbalseoneun dallado kkeutnae Break it up
Roll up!

Get ready, hold the reins du sone kkwak teureojwiji
iri wa Now you see apjilleo nan All thang
What a mess mess mess bwabwa naui Behave
Fast fast fast Make it what you do like

All eyes on me eodirodeun Yeah
dallineun gil, geu gil wieseo
pyeongbeomhaetdeon I, be a rider
mudae wie nan Jeanne d’Arc
Roll up!

Ridin’ with the crew bureul butyeo

Covered up in jewels
That’s a must have
What you, what you trying to do
We have no break
chulbalseoneun dallado kkeutnae Break it up
Roll up!

Ridin’ with the crew
It’s GIRL’s THANG
eonjena urin jayurowo (That’s a GIRL’s THANG)
Watcha watcha tryna do taoreuge
jikyeobwara King of move
Won’t back down Run on

Betcha drop that bomb mearichyeo Drums
